SuperSystem Example: Client With Three Automated
Webinars

SuperSystem
Level 1
Been
Through
Webinar One
Campaign?
No
Yes
Been
Through Webinar 2
Campaign?
Yes
Been
Through Webinar 3
Campaign?
Yes
Send To
SuperSystem
Phase 2
Send To Webinar
1 Campaign
No
Send To Webinar
2 Campaign
No
Send To Webinar
3 Campaign
Enter
SuperSystem
Level 2
Register For
Webinar 1?
No
Yes 	Register For
Webinar 2 	Yes 	Register For
Webinar 3 	Yes
Send To
SuperSystem
Phase 3
Send To Webinar
1 Campaign
No
Send To Webinar
2 Campaign
No
Send To Webinar
3 Campaign
Enter
SuperSystem
Level 3
Attend Webinar
1?
No
Yes 	Attend Webinar
2? 	Yes 	Attend Webinar
3? 	Yes
Send To
SuperSystem
Phase 3
Send To Webinar
1 Campaign
No
Send To Webinar
2 Campaign
No
Send To Webinar
3 Campaign
Level 1: Check To See if They've Been In The
Campaign At All
Level 2: Check To See if They Registered
Level 3: Check To See if They Attended
Enter
SuperSystem
Level 4
Saw Pitch
Webinar 1?
No
Yes 	Saw Pitch
Webinar 2? 	Yes 	Saw Pitch
Webinar 3? 	Yes 	End

1 Campaign
No

Level 4: Check To See if They Saw Pitch
